parameters.jsCode: const search=$input.first().json;const tickets=search.results||[];const meta=$("Build HubSpot Query").first().json._meta;const signature=(meta.signature||"").toLowerCase();const STOP=new Set(["the","a","an","and","or","for","with","from","to","of","in","on","by","this","that","is","are","was","were","be","been","being","have","has","had","do","does","did","will","would","should","could","may","might","must","shall","not","no","yes","if","then","else","at","as","it","its","our","we","you","your","my","me","i","but","so"]);const tok=s=>(s||"").toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g," ").split(/\s+/).filter(w=>w.length>=3&&!STOP.has(w));const sigTok=new Set(tok(signature));const jaccard=(a,b)=>{const ia=Array.from(a).filter(x=>b.has(x)).length;const u=new Set([...a,...b]).size;return u?ia/u:0;};const matches=[];for(const t of tickets){const p=t.properties||{};const cmpStr=(p.subject||"")+" "+(p.content||"");const cmpTok=new Set(tok(cmpStr));const sim=jaccard(sigTok,cmpTok);if(sim<0.2)continue;const notes=p.outcome_notes||"";let decision="UNKNOWN";if(notes.startsWith("APPROVED"))decision="APPROVED";else if(notes.startsWith("REJECTED"))decision="REJECTED";else if(notes.startsWith("ACKNOWLEDGED"))decision="ACKNOWLEDGED";else if(notes.startsWith("DEFERRED"))decision="DEFERRED";const paulComment=(notes.match(/—\s*(.+)$/)||[])[1]||"";matches.push({ticketId:t.id,subject:p.subject,decision,paulComment:paulComment.slice(0,400),agent:p.agent_name,similarity:Math.round(sim*100)/100,age_days:Math.round((Date.now()-new Date(p.hs_lastmodifieddate).getTime())/86400000)});}matches.sort((a,b)=>b.similarity-a.similarity);const strongReject=matches.find(m=>m.decision==="REJECTED"&&m.similarity>=0.5);const strongApprove=matches.find(m=>m.decision==="APPROVED"&&m.similarity>=0.7);const should_skip=!!(strongReject||strongApprove);let skip_reason=null;if(strongReject)skip_reason=`Recently REJECTED similar proposal (sim ${strongReject.similarity}) - "${strongReject.subject}". Paul comment: ${strongReject.paulComment||"none"}`;else if(strongApprove)skip_reason=`Recently APPROVED (sim ${strongApprove.similarity}) - "${strongApprove.subject}" - do not re-propose.`;const mid_matches=matches.filter(m=>m.similarity>=0.3&&m.similarity<0.5&&m.decision==="REJECTED").slice(0,3);const learnings_for_prompt=mid_matches.length?("PRIOR PAUL FEEDBACK (incorporate into proposal):\n"+mid_matches.map(m=>`- Previously rejected "${m.subject}": ${m.paulComment||"(no comment)"}`).join("\n")):null;return [{json:{should_skip,skip_reason,learnings_for_prompt,signature_received:signature,window_days:meta.days,agent:meta.agent,total_matches:matches.length,top_matches:matches.slice(0,5)}}];

const search=$input.first().json;const tickets=search.results||[];const meta=$("Build HubSpot Query").first().json._meta;const signature=(meta.signature||"").toLowerCase();const STOP=new Set(["the","a","an","and","or","for","with","from","to","of","in","on","by","this","that","is","are","was","were","be","been","being","have","has","had","do","does","did","will","would","should","could","may","might","must","shall","not","no","yes","if","then","else","at","as","it","its","our","we","you","your","my","me","i","but","so"]);const tok=s=>(s||"").toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g," ").split(/\s+/).filter(w=>w.length>=3&&!STOP.has(w));const sigTok=new Set(tok(signature));const jaccard=(a,b)=>{const ia=Array.from(a).filter(x=>b.has(x)).length;const u=new Set([...a,...b]).size;return u?ia/u:0;};const matches=[];for(const t of tickets){const p=t.properties||{};const cmpStr=(p.subject||"")+" "+(p.content||"");const cmpTok=new Set(tok(cmpStr));const sim=jaccard(sigTok,cmpTok);if(sim<0.2)continue;const notes=p.outcome_notes||"";let decision="UNKNOWN";if(notes.startsWith("APPROVED"))decision="APPROVED";else if(notes.startsWith("REJECTED"))decision="REJECTED";else if(notes.startsWith("ACKNOWLEDGED"))decision="ACKNOWLEDGED";else if(notes.startsWith("DEFERRED"))decision="DEFERRED";const paulComment=(notes.match(/—\s*(.+)$/)||[])[1]||"";matches.push({ticketId:t.id,subject:p.subject,decision,paulComment:paulComment.slice(0,400),agent:p.agent_name,similarity:Math.round(sim*100)/100,age_days:Math.round((Date.now()-new Date(p.hs_lastmodifieddate).getTime())/86400000)});}matches.sort((a,b)=>b.similarity-a.similarity);const strongReject=matches.find(m=>m.decision==="REJECTED"&&m.similarity>=0.5);const strongApprove=matches.find(m=>m.decision==="APPROVED"&&m.similarity>=0.7);const should_skip=!!(strongReject||strongApprove);let skip_reason=null;if(strongReject)skip_reason=`Recently REJECTED similar proposal (sim ${strongReject.similarity}) - "${strongReject.subject}". Paul comment: ${strongReject.paulComment||"none"}`;else if(strongApprove)skip_reason=`Recently APPROVED (sim ${strongApprove.similarity}) - "${strongApprove.subject}" - do not re-propose.`;const mid_matches=matches.filter(m=>m.similarity>=0.3&&m.similarity<0.5&&m.decision==="REJECTED").slice(0,3);const learnings_for_prompt=mid_matches.length?("PRIOR PAUL FEEDBACK (incorporate into proposal):\n"+mid_matches.map(m=>`- Previously rejected "${m.subject}": ${m.paulComment||"(no comment)"}`).join("\n")):null;return [{json:{should_skip,skip_reason,learnings_for_prompt,signature_received:signature,window_days:meta.days,agent:meta.agent,total_matches:matches.length,top_matches:matches.slice(0,5)}}];
